channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Everything you need to know about the water drops in California during wildfires
item.description: Firefighters in California are battling the fires from the sky using a variety of specialized aircraft that dump water and fire retardant onto the terrain below.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Powerful winter storm that dumped snow in US South maintains its icy grip
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Flight cancellations piled up and officials warned of continuing dangerous roads Saturday in the wake of a winter storm that brought biting cold and wet snow to the U.S. South, leading to school closures and disrupting travel.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY and BEN FINLEY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Walmart recalls 12,000 cartons of chicken broth
item.description: Walmart has recalled over 12,000 cartons of Great Value Family Size Chicken Broth due to packaging issues that could lead to spoilage, according to the Food and Drug Administration (FDA).
item.dc:creator: Reagan Wynn, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Gun jams as woman tries to shoot boyfriend: Tennessee police
item.description: A Tennessee woman is facing an attempted murder charge after reportedly attempting to shoot her boyfriend before her gun jammed, Memphis Police said.
item.dc:creator: Raven Moore, Fox 5

item.title: Santa Anita postpones weekend racing as track is staging area for fire relief efforts
item.description: A flareup of the wildfire on the west side of Los Angeles that prompted new evacuations has caused Santa Anita to cancel horse racing this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Are there no Michelin-starred restaurants near you? There's a reason for that
item.description: You'd have difficulty finding Michelin-starred restaurants in most states — but it's not because there aren't excellent eaters in those places.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: MAP: Emergency room visits for respiratory illnesses are soaring in these states
item.description: A number of states are seeing a spike in hospital visits caused by respiratory illnesses as we enter the New Year.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, ABC 4

item.title: NBA postpones Rockets vs. Hawks game because of winter storm
item.description: The game between the Houston Rockets and Atlanta Hawks scheduled for Saturday has been postponed because of a winter storm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How a week of weather extremes upended the lives of millions of Americans
item.description: It was a week of fire and ice. It began with millions of people across the U.S. shivering amid blizzard conditions and frigid air that lasted for days, thanks to a jet stream that slips out of its usual path more often these days.
item.dc:creator: MELINA WALLING, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Sam Moore, who sang ‘Soul Man’ in Sam & Dave duo, dies at 89 due to surgery complications
item.description: Sam Moore, the surviving half and higher voice of the 1960s duo Sam & Dave that was known for such definitive hits of the era as “Soul Man” and “Hold On, I'm Comin,’” has died. He was 89.
item.dc:creator: KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Power grid faults surged right before Los Angeles wildfires began: expert
item.description: A company that monitors electrical activity says faults along the Los Angeles power grid soared in the same areas where three of this week’s major wildfires are occurring.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Los Angeles County medical examiner's office confirms wildfire death toll rises to 16
item.description: The Los Angeles County medical examiner’s office says the confirmed death toll from the wildfires ravaging the area has risen to 16.
item.dc:creator: Manuel Valdes, Julie Watson, John Seewer And Heather Hollingsworth, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Blue Jays add All-Star reliever Jeff Hoffman with $33 million, 3-year contract
item.description: All-Star reliever Jeff Hoffman and the Toronto Blue Jays have agreed to a $33 million, three-year contract.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Powerful winter storm dumps heavy snow, causing flight delays, slick roads and school closings
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — A powerful winter storm that dumped heavy snow and glazed roads with ice across much of Texas and Oklahoma lumbered eastward into Southern U.S. states Friday, making for dicey travel and a rare snow day for many students.
item.dc:creator: KATE BRUMBACK and TRAVIS LOLLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fire chief urges public to trust alerts despite false warning
item.description: "Our goal is not to have erroneous alerts go out," said Kenichi Haskett, section chief for the LA County Fire Department.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: LA Rams head for Arizona and a crucial playoff game with their minds on their fire-ravaged hometown
item.description: The Los Angeles Rams wrapped up practice at their training complex Friday under blue skies with bruise-colored clouds of wildfire smoke lurking on the horizon.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Rare gold coin found in red kettle donations for The Salvation Army
item.description: A rare South African Krugerrand gold coin worth thousands was found amid the spare change donated to a Salvation Army red kettle in Colorado.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Factor, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Biden takes unexpected, impromptu questions from press in final days
item.description: President Biden opted Friday to voluntarily take a host of questions from the press after delivering remarks on the day’s job report, a speech that had been put on the White House schedule last minute.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: LA Mayor Karen Bass faces critical leadership test as questions emerge about wildfire response
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Earlier this week, as hurricane-strength winds blew through bone-dry hillside subdivisions, Los Angeles saw its worst nightmare realized as long-predicted firestorms engulfed wide swaths of the nation's second-largest city.
item.dc:creator: NICHOLAS RICCARDI and MICHAEL R. BLOOD, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: WATCH: Flying block of snow smashes through Kansas truck driver's windshield
item.description: Clean the snow off your vehicle. It's a warning many northerners have heard before; but one video taken during a recent winter storm illustrates just how dangerous leftover snow can be.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Rains, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Judge holds Giuliani in contempt for defaming Georgia election workers
item.description: A federal judge on Friday held Rudy Giuliani in civil contempt for skirting an agreement not to make new false claims about two Georgia election workers he was ordered to pay $146 million for defaming.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Americans have dimmer view of Biden than they did of Trump or Obama as term ends, AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As Joe Biden prepares to leave office, Americans have a dimmer view of his presidency than they did at the end of Donald Trump's first term or Barack Obama's second, a new poll finds. Around one-quarter of U.S.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Russian mercenary arrested at US-Mexico border with drone
item.description: McALLEN, Texas (ValleyCentral) — Border Patrol arrested a former Russian mercenary on Saturday, when he illegally crossed the Rio Grande near Roma. Timur Praliev waded across the Rio Grande carrying two passports and $4,000.
item.dc:creator: Dave Hendricks, NewsNation

item.title: How to donate to LA wildfire relief
item.description: A swarm of winter wildfires ravaged America's most heavily-populated county to start 2025, scorching cars, banks, bungalows and multi-million dollar mansions.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, ABC 4

item.title: Lisa Kudrow says Matthew Perry left a note for her inside a recognizable 'Friends' prop
item.description: "I hadn't opened it up or looked inside it, but yeah he did. He had a note in there and I forgot about it," Kudrow said.
item.dc:creator: Emily Smith, ABC 4

item.title: Actor Steve Guttenberg returns to his wildfire-charred LA neighborhood
item.description: Steve Guttenberg awoke Thursday morning to a grim reality: The treacherous wildfire that tore through the Pacific Palisades had left his once-lush neighborhood charred and unrecognizable.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Supreme Court seems likely to uphold law that would force TikTok to shut down on Jan. 19
item.description: The Supreme Court on Friday seemed likely to uphold a law that would ban TikTok in the United States beginning Jan. 19 unless the popular social media program is sold by its China-based parent company.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: From Carter's funeral, an American snapshot: A singular image, 5 presidents, 379 years of history
item.description: Look at their faces — formal, etched with experience, laden with the weight of momentous decisions. Add up their years: 379 to be exact, enough time to take you back into the mid-1600s, when the notion of the American nation was still more than a century away.
item.dc:creator: TED ANTHONY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What ignited the deadly California wildfires? Investigators consider an array of possibilities
item.description: Investigators are considering an array of possible ignition sources for the huge fires that have killed at least 10 people and destroyed thousands of homes and businesses in the Los Angeles area.
item.dc:creator: Jason Dearen, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The Los Angeles landmarks from film, TV damaged by wildfires
item.description: The high school where Brian De Palma brought Stephen King’s “Carrie” to life, Will Rogers’ ranch house, and a motel owned by William Randolph Hearst are among some of the famous structures that have been damaged or destroyed by the California wildfires.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: As wildfires burn in LA, what to know about protective masks
item.description: Certain masks are effective in protecting against wildfire smoke — but only if they are fitted and worn properly.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, KRON4

item.title: Las Vegas Raider Charles Snowden thought he was in Florida during DUI arrest: Video
item.description: Tests showed Snowden’s blood-alcohol level was more than double the legal limit after officers found him asleep and unresponsive in a running SUV, documents show.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, NewsNation

item.title: Sen. J.D. Vance resigns ahead of vice presidential inauguration
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) -- U.S. Sen. J.D. Vance resigned from his seat in Congress' upper chamber on Thursday ahead of his inauguration as vice president to President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Natalie Fahmy, NewsNation

item.title: Aerial video shows before and after views of Palisades Fire in Los Angeles
item.description: “I couldn’t image what we were preparing to see once we got over here on this side of the hill,” pilot Rich Prickett said.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, NewsNation

item.title: Lawsuit by New Orleans truck attack victims says city, contractors failed to implement safety system
item.description: Six people who were injured and the father of a man who was killed in the New Year's truck attack filed a lawsuit Thursday against the City of New Orleans and two contractors, claiming they failed to protect revelers from an Army veteran who sped around a police blockade and raced down Bourbon Stree
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Biden says he could've beaten Trump in November
item.description: President Joe Biden said early Wednesday that he thinks he would have beaten President-elect Donald Trump if he stuck with his reelection bid in an interview with USA Today.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5
